signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Strong consumer demand drove total retail sales across the marketplace up double-digits versus the prior year.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We will continue to increase investment in innovation...we expect SG&A to grow slightly above revenue as we increase investment in demand creation and invest in capabilities to transform NIKE's operating model.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Our top franchises drove strong full price sales with mid-single-digit price increases...we are planning for low-single-digit price increases in fiscal 2024.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We are entering fiscal 2024 on our front foot, ready to navigate any uncertainty that may be ahead of us, and ready to compete from a position of strength.
